title: GetResponse vs Sendinblue (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare GetResponse vs Sendinblue. See pricing, features, ratings, and which email marketing tool wins for your needs.
intro: GetResponse and Sendinblue (now Brevo) are both popular freemium email marketing platforms, but they serve different purposes. GetResponse excels as a complete marketing automation suite for course creators and webinar hosts, while Sendinblue specializes in transactional email, SMS, and CRM functionality. Choosing between them depends on whether you need comprehensive marketing automation or a multi-channel communication platform.

comparison_table.tool_a: Email, webinars, landing pages, automation, courses, funnels
comparison_table.tool_b: Email, SMS, WhatsApp, transactional API, chat, CRM

comparison_table.tool_a: Online course creators and webinar hosts

choose_a_if: You create online courses or host webinars and need integrated course delivery
You want comprehensive marketing automation with conversion funnels and landing pages
You prefer a platform specifically built for digital product creators
choose_b_if: You need multi-channel communication (SMS, WhatsApp, email) in one platform
You send high volumes of transactional emails and need a robust API
You want the largest free tier with 100,000 contacts at no cost

faq.a: Neither is objectively better—it depends on your needs. GetResponse is superior for course creators and webinar hosts due to its integrated educational features and conversion funnels. Sendinblue excels for businesses needing transactional email, SMS, and multi-channel communication. Check the comparison table to match your specific use case.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, GetResponse or Sendinblue?
faq.a: Sendinblue's free tier is significantly more generous with 100,000 contacts versus GetResponse's 500. However, GetResponse's paid plans start at $19/month compared to Sendinblue's $25/month. For budget-conscious users starting out, Sendinblue offers better free value.

faq.q: Can I switch from Sendinblue to GetResponse?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms allow you to export your contact lists and email templates. Migration is straightforward for basic email lists, though you may need to reconfigure automation workflows and integrations in your new platform. Most users can complete the switch within a few hours.
